steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage says elements of Spanish mission style have been 'reproduced throughout the state' and uses Santa Clara University as an example. The blank must describe what that university's design does to the Spanish mission style — a word meaning to copy or reproduce it.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "renovate": 'Renovate' means to restore or update an existing structure. Santa Clara University didn't fix the actual missions; it built something new in their style. Wrong direction. ✗
  • "imitate": 'Imitate' means to copy or mimic. The passage explicitly says the style has been 'reproduced' — imitating is reproducing. Matches the context exactly. ✓
  • "neglect": 'Neglect' means to ignore or fail to care for. A design that echoes the mission style is doing the opposite of neglecting it. ✗
  • "reject": 'Reject' means to dismiss or refuse. The university draws from the mission style, not away from it. ✗
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
